SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Graph<V extends Comparable<V>>

Type Parameters:
V - The type of nodes in the graph.
All Superinterfaces:
Collection<V>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Graph.AdjacencyMapGraph
public interface Graph<V extends Comparable<V>> extends Collection<V>
A purely functional Graph interface using an Adjacency Map representation.

    • topologicalSort

      default Maybe<List<V>> topologicalSort()
      Performs a topological sort on the graph. Returns Maybe.nothing() if the graph contains a cycle.
      Returns:
      Some(list) of nodes in topological order, or Nothing if cycle found.
